meaning: n.犁v.耕,犁,犁耕,费力穿过,艰苦前进,在考试中淘汰
examples: They were no longer using mules and horses to plough their fields.
You can start again on mathematics, until is it is time to learn to plough.
The water buffalo squelched up and down the paddy fields, pulling the plough.
For almost five years, Schering-Plough has been waiting for its labs to produce a new hit.
Schering-Plough, which has long dominated the interferon market, sells the very similar polymer-coated interferon called Peg-Intron.
